description_long: This is a heavily armored tracked combat vehicle, featuring a long, prominent main cannon extending from a low-profile, angular hull. The vehicle is covered in a green and brown camouflage pattern, with visible hatches, periscopes, and external equipment mounted on the upper surfaces. The tracks are wide and robust, supported by multiple road wheels on each side, designed for traversing rough terrain. The hull appears to be constructed from thick, sloped armor plating, providing enhanced protection against projectiles. Antennas and additional stowage are visible on the roof, indicating communication and operational readiness. The overall design is utilitarian, optimized for battlefield survivability and firepower.
description: A low-profile, heavily armored tracked combat vehicle with a long main cannon and green-brown camouflage. Features include sloped armor, multiple road wheels, and roof-mounted equipment.
description_view_0: Front view shows the long main cannon, sloped frontal armor, and the compact, angular hull.
description_view_1: Right side view highlights the length of the cannon, the full track system with multiple road wheels, and roof-mounted equipment.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back armor, engine deck details, and rear stowage, with the cannon extending away from the viewer.
description_view_3: Left side view mirrors the right, showing the track system, side armor, and the extended main cannon.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large main cannon mounted centrally on the hull front; no additional weapon mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped armor plating; hull and turret are angular and reinforced, with no visible modular or reactive panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Woodland camouflage pattern with irregular green and brown patches and some black accents.
